` tag in your HTML file. ```css @media (max-width: 768px){ html{ scroll-snap-type:none; } body{ overflow-x:hidden; } nav{ padding:1rem; flex-direction:column; gap:.8rem; } .nav-logo{ font-size:15px; text-align:center; } .nav-links{ gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; } .nav-links a{ font-size:10px; } .slide{ min-height:auto; padding:6rem 0 4rem; } .slide-content{ padding:1.5rem; width:100%; } /* HERO */ .hero-tag{ font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.18em; } .hero-name{ font-size:52px; line-height:1; margin-bottom:1rem; } .hero-sub{ font-size:18px; line-height:1.6; } .hero-btns{ flex-direction:column; width:100%; } .btn-white, .btn-outline{ width:100%; text-align:center; } .photo-circle{ width:110px; height:110px; } /* ABOUT */ .about-layout{ grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:1.5rem; } .about-title{ font-size:34px; } .about-body{ font-size:18px; line-height:1.7; } .about-stats{ flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; } .stat-num{ font-size:28px; } /* SERVICES */ .services-header .sec-title{ font-size:36px; } .services-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .svc-name{ font-size:18px; } .svc-desc{ font-size:16px; line-height:1.6; } /* TOOLS */ .tools-title{ font-size:34px; } .chip{ font-size:15px; padding:10px 14px; } /* WORK */ .work-title{ font-size:34px; } .case-row{ flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; } .case-name{ font-size:18px; } .case-desc{ font-size:16px; line-height:1.6; } /* CONTACT */ .contact-title{ font-size:34px; } .contact-sub{ font-size:16px; line-height:1.6; } .contact-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .contact-footer{ flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; gap:1rem; } .field-input, .field-textarea{ font-size:16px; } .scroll-hint{ display:none; } } ``` Also fix this typo in your CSS: Replace: ```css .svc-name{font:size 19px; ``` With: ```css .svc-name{font-size:19px; ```

About me

Detail-oriented,
results-driven.

I'm a virtual operations assistant with a passion for bringing order to chaos. From inbox management to system builds, I take on the operational load so you can stay in your zone of genius.

Based in Nairobi, serving clients worldwide across time zones.
